# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service_microservice_a
  url: http://microservice-a.example.com
  tags:
    - microservice_a

- name: service_microservice_b
  url: http://microservice-b.example.com
  tags:
    - microservice_b

routes:
- name: route_to_microservice_a
  paths:
    - /api/a/
  service: service_microservice_a
  strip_path: true
  plugins:
    - name: rate-limiting
      config:
        minute: 10
        hour: 600
        policy: local

- name: route_to_microservice_b
  paths:
    - /api/b/
  service: service_microservice_b
  strip_path: true
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      enabled: true
    - name: response-transformer
      config:
        remove_headers:
          - X-Secret-Header

plugins:
- name: request-size-limiting
  config:
    allowed_payload_size: 10485760  # 10MB in bytes
  tags:
    - global
